privileged_info_summary: The task docker_state_extraction@1 involves reverse-engineering a modified Docker container named acme-legacy-app running python:3.11-slim. The container has synthetic application data injected during setup: a Flask app (inventory_api.py) with a /health endpoint responding at port 8000, SQLite database with product inventory at /app/data/inventory.db, configuration file at /app/config.json, and startup script at /app/start.sh. The agent must create a Dockerfile in /home/ga/projects/acme-legacy-app that reproduces the container state, build the image as acme-legacy-app:restored, verify the restored image runs with a healthy /health endpoint response, and document findings in /home/ga/Desktop/container_changes.txt. The verifier checks for valid base image, container functionality, file restoration, Python dependencies (Flask 3.0.0, gunicorn 21.2.0, requests 2.31.0), system packages (curl, vim), and manifest documentation, with a passing score threshold of 65 points out of 100.
